title: Slovakian Wheat Flatbread
description: A traditional Slovakian flatbread recipe, perfect for accompanying main courses or as a side dish.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour in a warm place.
Punch down the dough and roll out into a thin circle.
Transfer the dough to a baking sheet or flatbread stone.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
